name: critical-score
description: Maximum risk scenario: near-full context, maximum saturation, high ambiguity, multiple volatility phrases. All five components near peak.

input.prompt: write a detailed comprehensive optimization. improve and optimize everything to be better quality. write a detailed plan.

notes: Length 110000/128000=0.859→bucket=90. Context (126000/128000)=0.984→bucket=95. Ambiguity: improve+optimize+better=3 matches/17 words=0.176→bucket=90. Structural=100. Volatility: write a detailed(+25)+comprehensive(+25)=50→bucket=50. Score=87.
